note: D2b — 50 fresh neutral prompts for the pre-registered confirmation run (reports/confirmation_prereg.md). Written 2026-06-09, AFTER the coalition and detector were frozen; never used in any selection, tuning, or exploratory analysis. Same register as D2 (open-ended, hinge-free: no compare/contrast/misconception framings), disjoint topics.
prompts: Describe the first hour of a night shift at a small bakery.
Explain how a community garden assigns and maintains its plots.
Sketch a portrait of a ferry deckhand on a morning commuter run.
Walk through how a public swimming pool opens for the day.
Reflect on what makes a neighbourhood hardware store endure.
Describe the atmosphere of a laundromat on a Sunday evening.
Explain how a small town organises its annual agricultural show.
Discuss the role of a crossing guard in a school's morning routine.
Describe what a lighthouse keeper's logbook might record in a week.
Explain how a community choir prepares for a winter concert.
Walk through the steps of repairing a bicycle puncture at home.
Describe a train station waiting room an hour before the first service.
Reflect on the appeal of keeping a paper diary in adulthood.
Explain how a food bank sorts and distributes donations.
Sketch a portrait of a museum security guard who knows every gallery.
Describe the routine of a milk delivery round in a rural area.
Explain how an amateur astronomy club runs a public stargazing night.
Discuss what makes a good pub quiz question.
Describe the kitchen of a school canteen during the lunch rush.
Walk through how a secondhand bookshop prices its stock.
Reflect on the experience of learning to drive later in life.
Explain how a village cricket pitch is prepared for a weekend match.
Describe an airport chapel in the middle of the afternoon.
Sketch a portrait of a piano tuner visiting a family home.
Explain how a repair café matches volunteers to broken items.
Describe the last bus route of the night through a quiet town.
Discuss the role of a scorekeeper in amateur baseball.
Explain how a community radio station fills its overnight hours.
Describe a hotel breakfast room ten minutes before it closes.
Walk through the process of re-potting a root-bound houseplant.
Reflect on what a childhood bedroom reveals when revisited as an adult.
Describe the back room of a florist on the morning of a big wedding.
Explain how a marina assigns berths to visiting boats.
Sketch a portrait of a court stenographer during a long trial.
Describe a city park's maintenance crew starting their summer day.
Explain how a blood donation session is set up in a village hall.
Discuss the satisfaction of finishing a long jigsaw puzzle.
Describe the cab of a long-haul lorry at a midnight rest stop.
Explain how an apiarist inspects a hive in early spring.
Walk through the closing routine of a small art-supply shop.
Reflect on the rhythm of tending a sourdough starter through a busy week.
Describe a primary school's lost-property box at the end of term.
Explain how a town's holiday lights get planned and installed.
Sketch a portrait of a wildlife rehabilitator releasing a recovered bird.
Describe the engine room of a heritage steam railway on running day.
Explain how a chess club pairs players for a club championship.
Discuss what makes a hotel concierge's recommendations trustworthy.
Describe the public gallery of a town council meeting on a rainy Tuesday.
